info.description: Services provided in the 3DSpace service for connections to SCM systems
info.title: Design Data Management Connector Web Services

parameters.name: $mask
parameters.description: Mask defining what will be returned. Default Mask is:dsmvscm:Connector.basic

400.description: BAD REQUEST. The request could not be understood by the server due to malformed syntax. The client SHOULD NOT repeat the request without modifications.

401.description: UNAUTHORIZED. The request requires user authentication. The response MUST include a WWW-Authenticate header field containing a challenge applicable to the requested resource. The client MAY repeat the request with a suitable Authorization header field. If the request already included Authorization credentials, then the 401 response indicates that authorization has been refused for those credentials. If the 401 response contains the same challenge as the prior response, and the user agent has already attempted authentication at least once, then the user SHOULD be presented the entity that was given in the response, since that entity might include relevant diagnostic information. HTTP access authentication is explained in "HTTP Authentication: Basic and Digest Access Authentication".

500.description: INTERNAL SERVER ERROR. A generic error message, given when an unexpected condition was encountered and no more specific message is suitable.

get.summary: Gets a list of SCM Repository Connectors from indexed search
get.description: Gets a list of SCM Repository Connectors. By default, returns a total of up to 50 items, can be optionally increased up to 1000 items using $top query parameter. Recommendation: Use $searchStr query parameter for better performances

parameters.name: $searchStr
parameters.description: Provide a 3DEXPERIENCE search expression with a minimum of two characters. Note that this will run on indexed data only.</br>Example1 searchStr="Connector1"

parameters.name: $mask
parameters.description: Mask defining what will be returned. Default Mask is:dsmvscm:Connector.basic

parameters.name: $top
parameters.description: Represents the total number of items returned from the search, accepts a maximum value of 1000.

parameters.name: $skip
parameters.description: Represents the number of items to skip (to be used along with $top query parameter)

400.description: BAD REQUEST. The request could not be understood by the server due to malformed syntax. The client SHOULD NOT repeat the request without modifications.

401.description: UNAUTHORIZED. The request requires user authentication. The response MUST include a WWW-Authenticate header field containing a challenge applicable to the requested resource. The client MAY repeat the request with a suitable Authorization header field. If the request already included Authorization credentials, then the 401 response indicates that authorization has been refused for those credentials. If the 401 response contains the same challenge as the prior response, and the user agent has already attempted authentication at least once, then the user SHOULD be presented the entity that was given in the response, since that entity might include relevant diagnostic information. HTTP access authentication is explained in "HTTP Authentication: Basic and Digest Access Authentication".

500.description: INTERNAL SERVER ERROR. A generic error message, given when an unexpected condition was encountered and no more specific message is suitable.

itemAddress.description: This is the relative leaf uri to a repository or just the repository id if internal. The connector path contains the root portion of the uri.

userAddress.description: This is the full uri of the repository. It is the combination of connector path connection itemAddress

versionAddress.description: The repository version, which can be dynamic (ex. branch name) or static (ex. commit or tag name)

versionAddressType.description: The type of version address, which can be dynamic (ex. branch name), static (ex. commit or tag name), or unknown

dynamicVersionAddress.description: The saved dynamic version address (ex. branch name) to allow for restoring static back to dynamic version address. Can only be set if state is frozen or rleased.

itemAddress.description: This is the relative leaf uri to a repository or just the repository id if internal. The connector path contains the root portion of the uri.

userAddress.description: This is the full uri of the repository. It is the combination of connector path connection itemAddress

versionAddress.description: The repository version, which can be dynamic (ex. branch name) or static (ex. commit or tag name)

versionAddressType.description: The type of version address, which can be dynamic (ex. branch name), static (ex. commit or tag name), or unknown

dynamicVersionAddress.description: The saved dynamic version address (ex. branch name) to allow for restoring static back to dynamic version address. Can only be set if state is frozen or rleased.

address.description: The url to the connection service

path.description: The root uri to one or more repositories. For git it is a path, for DesignSync it is a url

path.description: The root uri to one or more repositories. For git it is a path, for DesignSync it is a url

examples: My Value, true, 3.14, [My value 1, My value 2], [12,45,85]
